entry.title: Re: Error handling? What error handling?
entry.content:
While we're in the confessional...

As a student, we were learning to write compilers in C (This was before C++. Yes. I am that old), on Sun workstations. They were networked together and we discovered that we could log on to another workstation without any further credential checks. Mostly, we were using command lines. We'd type something in, it would execute on the other computer, and the results would come to ours.

Then we discovered that any commands that produced graphical output turned up on the suborned workstation, not ours. This enabled jolly japes like flashing up a password screen on some unsuspecting student and thereby gain access to all their files.

We also discovered how to mirror text output, so anything the remote system typed appeared on both our screens, likewise anything we typed. I recall we had some poor sap (not SAP) convinced that he was playing a (text based) adventure game...

I had a little program that bounced a ball across the screen. I'd run it every now and then on someone else's workstation and watch them jump. Then I thought it would be fun to do it on every workstation on the network, to cries of "oh come on, we're trying to work here".

Then I though how about if every bounce spawns two balls that bounce. On every workstation.

Oops. And I'm not talking about a programming paradigm.

I was young and foolish and was never caught. I never did it again - even being old and foolish.

entry.title: Re: A coding contest over coffee?!
entry.content:
Since we're only allowed one, I've added another incident as a reply to mine.

I'm a fine law-abiding citizen now. Honest!

entry.title: Re: LICKING THE GIF CYCLE
entry.content: Totally wonderful. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Green Token Launched as Generally Available!
entry.content: This is great news. There are so many important use cases from palm oil tracking and green hydrogen to EUDR support. I am looking forward to seeing it grow.

entry.title: Re: Killer Cycle
entry.content: @Tomas_Buryanek The time taken between doing something you really shouldn't have and realising it is called a "nono-second".

entry.title: Re: certification check for an operation activity in Orde...
entry.content:
Thanks for the reply Rahul

I have done the same steps You have mentioned and mapped appropriate parameters. 

I'm getting above error. but the same production process works well when assigned to a button.

Thanks and Regards,

Anvesh

entry.title: Re: The future of Blockchain & SAP
entry.content: I can't give many details, but where I worked in 2019, one of my colleagues was working on exactly this, for transmission of health data for clinical trials.

entry.title: Unable to manage LOVC dependencies in S4 HANA public cloud:
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have a requirement to add an object dependency to BOM items. As far as my knowledge goes, we cannot use AVC for that. We need to use LOVC here with processing mode as Classic.

When I try to create a dependency for a material using PMEVC, by default it is created as AVC and it does not let me switch to Classic:

 

Now, I could not find an equivalent of transaction CU01 in S4 Public Cloud where I can create a new object dependency with processing mode as Classic.

The only work around I found was to use the environment section on the left side panel of PMEVC where I can create a Classic dependency:

 

 

 

 

Now I can save it, but I cannot access it after that through PMEVC as system does not allow me to assign this to any configuration profile:

 

The only way I can access this is by using the app “Variant Configuration Overview”:

 

 

But the challenge here is, even if I try to modify this, I get the error message that I don’t have the access to CU02 which is not a public cloud application:

 

So, my question is, am I using the right approach? If yes, how can I resolve this issue of CU02 access?

If my approach is not correct, how do we work with classic object dependency (LOVC as we know it) in S4 Public Cloud?

Thank you

Snigdhodeep

entry.title: Re: Hyperlink from Field to Group
entry.content:
Hello, I believe that you would need to be using the DHTML viewer in an Enterprise environment (e.g. BOBJ or CR Server) in order for this to work. Please see the Report Part navigation section in help.sap.com.

"This navigation is available only in the DHTML viewers (zero-client, server-side viewers)."

entry.title: Re: How to display landed cost of multiped PO
entry.content: Dear Gaurav-chauhan, We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no further updates under the topic. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions. Best regards, Geovana

entry.title: Re: certification check for an operation activity in Orde...
entry.content:
Error seems the user which is trying to start the operation activity does not have required certification assigned . Check the manage user assignment app for the certificate assignment .

Note :

a. compare the User Id in both the flow , it might be you are passing different id in input parameter.

b. Manage automatic trigger uses technical service user to invoke the production process , which might not be same as operator 

So this way you wont be having the current operator user context in production process. You can query the SFC and check if it provides the operator context in production process and use that userid rather technical service user.

Otherwise another option to customize the standard Order POD  ( copy and change ) and enable a button using POD designer . You can assign an action in same same group of action where "Good receipt" posting is available, this is with low config effort.

Thanks

Rahul

entry.title: Re: SAP Plant Maintenance (EAM) Integration with SAP Extended Warehouse Management in S/4 HANA 2022
entry.content: Nice Blog @SaikiranGummadi  Very informative

entry.title: Re: Custom Tasks in Onboarding and Offboarding
entry.content: @DP4  - is the questionnaire within the custom task a document? That is the only way a document would be tied to a custom task within Profile. A custom task itself does not generate a form at this time however we are looking to provide the ability to tie a document flow to custom tasks in future.

entry.title: Re: Unable to manage LOVC dependencies in S4 HANA public...
entry.content:
Hi @snigdhodeep 

 

In S/4HANA Cloud only Advanced Variant Configuration is available.

In an Onpremise system or Private Cloud the customer has the possibility to select classical VC or AVC but 

this is not possible in Cloud .

 

The transaction CU02 is not available in Cloud as an app and PMEVC needs to be used instead.

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Outbound Communication to S4 On-Premise(OData) from B...
entry.content: You checked the wrong log: the "http_access.log" records only UI requests from the browser to port 8443, it has nothing to do with http requests to backend systems. As I said, these can be seen only in the Payload Trace. (Files traffic_trace_xxxx.trc.)

entry.title: Re: How to select BOM components in sales order based on...
entry.content: One quick follow up question (sorry) - is Classical VC (LO-VC) available in S/4HANA Cloud Public? I have not seen any option equivalent to CU01.

entry.title: Create business user API behavior
entry.content:
Hi,

I am creating business user using below API

querybusinessuserin


It creates business user. Also employee is getting created with above payload.

Is this expected behavior?

What change is needed if we don't want employee to get created with business user?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Create business user API behavior
entry.content: A Business User of the new SAP S/4HANA model is a Business Partner of role type Employee assigned to a SU01-user (workforce). Business Partner is the leading object. Therefore it is not supported to create just SU01-Users (Employee alone). A lot applications rely on this model and would not work anymore. There are no mechanisms currently to create 'Employee' record alone.

entry.title: Can we Activate Budget Availability Control for ACDOCP Table for Projects in S/4 HANA private Cloud?
entry.content:
We have SAP PPM in our landscape and a project is created in PS via a PPM Item.

If we refer this latest blog by @andrea_langlotz : Portfolio Management – Enhanced Financial Planning... - SAP Community, which sayes "With the recent SAP S/4HANA releases the integration capabilities of Financial Planning for Portfolio Management have been enhanced to support integration into the SAP S/4HANA periodic financial planning, i.e. ACDOCP based planning"

Which means we can use ACDOCP table to store the Budget values planned via PPM item as well in ACDOCP table with the correct plan category.

Question:

1) Can we Activate Budget Availability Control for ACDOCP Table for Projects in S/4 HANA 2023 private Cloud?

2) If yes, can we achive functionalities of Buget Transfer/Budget release/Budget supplimentals also from ACDOCP table?

3) If SAC is used for budget planning, are the values stored in ACDOCP Table and can we use the availability control from SAC in that case ?

4) Can we completely get rid of Old tables and move to combination of ACDOCP Table & ACDOCA tables going forward ?

Or can anyone please explain how is sap planning the Budget Availability Control for ACDOCP Table via ACDOCP Table?

Thanks in advance for the help!

entry.title: Re: From FSD document in TM to Create PO in ERP with other than item category U
entry.content: Hello Gurus: After modifying MM to accept service category K from TM, only the PO is generated but the Service Order is not created. If you know what else we should move the MM? I appreciate your comments

entry.title: Print a text block if there is more than x amount of products on my quotation in Crystal Reports
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm very new to SAP and Crystal Reports so i'll try to explain my issue as best as I can.

I've been building a Quotation form for my employer in Crystal Reports. The quotation pulls Article codes from SAP on a Quotation request into my report. Everything works perfectly but as soon as there are more than 4 products in the request, the 5th (and 6th and 7th and so on) will print to the next page (as they should).

On the first page I have headers (which are text blocks) for the products. These headers are built in Page header B. Which I can set to display only on page 1 or multiple pages.

Now here comes the problem. There is also a big text block in my report foot section after my details sections. This text block HAS to be in the report so my report will always consist of 2 pages. 
I want to make it so that when my quotation has more than 4 products it prints the Page header B on page 2 aswel, but if it has 4 or less products it shouldn't print it on any other page than page 1.

If it's possible at all, how could I implement this in my report? I was thinking to use an if statement to use in the Page header A section but i've got no clue what to write or what statment to put there.

If it's not possible then i'm open for any suggestions how I could fix this.

entry.title: Re: Deactivated workflow for journal entry but validation...
entry.content:
Hi mathieu7,

The validations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud are created in the following apps:

Manage Substitution Validation Rules Journal Entries app

Custom Logic app

You can check what is active and deactivate it.

Don't forget to check if the deactivation has no further impacts on more processes.

Best regards

Edna

entry.title: How to create technical users in SAP cloud
entry.content:
How to create technical user and assign them roles for computer or system? It is required to distinguish users between technical users and business users. And currently I only found business roles in the system.

For example, there is a computer and everyone use this computer can logon the SAP system.

Another situation is that OA system can do some activities in SAP system, and it is not employee.

So how can I create user ID for these 2 situations?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to create technical users in SAP cloud
entry.content:
Technical users can only be created by customers as type communication user or printing user. There are apps for communication users and for printing users. Maintain business user app is only for business users. Some of the examples i have put it below. It is not possible to create other technical users in cloud system.

 

https://me.sap.com/notes/0002792641


https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/user-management-overview-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/ba-p/13322516


https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/printing-in-the-sap-s-4hana-cloud-system/ba-p/12838853

entry.title: Re: Unable to manage LOVC dependencies in S4 HANA public...

This is available in the app Variant Configuration Overview. I have seen those even work (like selecting the right BOM component during MRP run) but those are not modifiable as system calls for CU02. Does this mean, although those elements are there, those are not modifiable at all?

entry.title: How to change Data service password after the password of default CMS,LCM,Audit database are changed
entry.content:
Hello Team,

How to change passwords on SAP Data service (BODS) server after the user passwords of default CMS ,LCM and Audit database are changed . Kindly suggest .


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change Data service password after the passwor...
entry.content:
Hi ,

Here is the KBA you can refer- 3078101 - How to change user password for SAP Data services?

The data services users are the same users in CMC>users and groups and you can change the password from the same place.

Thanks,
SAP Support

entry.content:

  • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location
  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I am looking at the SAP Certified Associate related to SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Having the certification will allow me to take advantage of the numerous ERP opportunities and give back to the community.

entry.title: No internal number assignment defined for EAN category EAN11
entry.content:
In product migration we upload a templates without GTIN category and GTIN  number   (we are not using GTIN in this product), from simulate step we receive error:

'No internal number assignment defined for EAN category EAN11' WE215

This happen only from certain material type.

Why is the error raised ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: No internal number assignment defined for EAN categor...
entry.content:
The GTIN Category is entered on Alternative Units of Measure sheet

With internal number assignment, you enter the GTIN category but not a GTIN.

This is the reason why the error appears.

please amend or remove the GTIN category from the Alternative Units of Measure sheet

entry.title: Re: How to set Flat Hierarchy with a switch when 'Show on...
entry.content:
@DavidRuizC 

Not sure but may be first try to set the hierarchy to All and then set it to flat.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: The upload file name is missing in object page when fiori app is created in SAP BAS using RAP
entry.content:
Basically, I have created an app which can do file upload using RAP. I noticed that when I am using the app created from SAP BAS, whenever I select and upload a file, the file name is always missing although I can see it from the payload. 

But when I upload the file using the fiori app in ADT (via Preview), this functionality is working fine and I can see the filename getting populated.

One difference I noticed is that from ADT, it is calling PATCH and GET in a batch.

PATCH zc_fileupload(Uname='AAA',IsActiveEntity=false)?sap-client=100 HTTP/1.1

GET zc_fileupload(Uname='AAA',IsActiveEntity=false)?sap-client=100&$select=Attachment,Filename HTTP/1.1

When testing from SAP BAS, I can only see the PATCH call and not the GET call which might be the reason why the filename is not getting displayed. I wonder if this is a bug or if there is a special handling/setting that I need to do in SAP BAS.

@Andre_Fischer, would you be able to help? Thanks.

entry.title: Supplier Payment Analysis (Open Payments)
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are trying to execute "Supplier Payment Analysis(Open Payments)" app in the system. We have got relevant data in the system still app is not generating any data. Kindly check. Screen shot attached.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Supplier Payment Analysis (Open Payments)
entry.content:
There are no open items with payment transaction "Yes" in the Manage Supplier line items app. Additionally, there are no open items with the item type "special G/L transactions".

Regarding the Supplier Payment Analysis app, you may encounter the message "No data found. Try adjusting the search or filter parameters." This message is displayed when there is no data available based on the search, filter criteria or in the transaction parameters.

For more information, you can refer to the documentation on Help Portal. The link is provided here: Supplier Payment Analysis (Open Payments)
In the documentation, you will find details on how to display aggregated data for payment documents that are not reconciled with invoices. 

The app also allows you to filter data by company code, supplier, or currency. 

You can use technical features such as posting comments on SAP Jam or sending emails from the app. Please note that payments in the supplier line have the indicator "Posting Key Used in a Payment Transaction" and down payments have the special G/L transaction type set to "A". 

Other open payments include all payments that are not reconciled with invoices, including open positions of residual payment documents.

entry.title: Re: Copy Actuals to Forecast Version Until Start Month in...
entry.content:
@pooja_elangovan01 

You have not mentioned what is maintained in attribute ( type integer) of the forecast version, the month number 7 or fully qualified date member 202407. I will assume its 7 ( guessing from your post)

Note: Attribute for forecast month should be of type integer.

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = BASEMEMBER([d/Date].[h/YQM], "2024") // Replace with parameter to make it dynamic MEMBERSET [d/Date] = BASEMEMBER([d/Date].[h/YQM], %Date%)
INTEGER @FCMonth
@FCMonth=ATTRIBUTE([d/Version].[p/start_month])
 
IF MONTH([d/Date])< @FCMonth THEN
DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]="public.Actual")
ENDIF

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Import Vendor invoice on Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Tak,

The Financial Posting periods (Manage Posting Periods app) and the Logistic Posting periods (Close Periods app) are in sync to post Supplier invoices, regardless of which app you use. This means you can only post supplier invoices in the periods open in the Logistic Periods. More details in the blog: How works the Close Periods app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?

You can upload mass invoices using the template in the Import Supplier Invoices app following the steps mentioned in the scope item J60 accounts payable - 4.4 Mass upload

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/globalSearch/J60

 

Best regards

Edna

entry.title: Re: SAC Exception Aggregation of NONE
entry.content:
@ebajema1 

Unfortunately that is how SAC Exception Aggregation "NONE" works. 

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Display G/L balances in FS10N transaction based on company code fiscal year period
entry.content:
Hello All, 

we have display the G\L Balances as per the Company code fiscal year period  Ex: India (April- March) instead of January to December, can someone help where we can do configuration changes so that we can display the balances as per fiscal year .

Below screen shot balances are displayed from January to December cycle

 

 

Thanks in Advance

sree

entry.title: A/R
entry.content: i want to extraact All A/R transactions within determined period to An Excel file. or print detailed statement for each customer account within period as batch in one process. is this possible?

entry.title: Re: Tcode F-90 / App with the same funtionality in SAP Pu...
entry.content:
Hi Chelo,

The app F-90 is deprecated in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

However, your customer can use the  Create Supplier Invoice - Advanced (MIRO) app with asset accounting. You need to activate the following flag in the configuration step 106330 – Activate Direct Postings to G/L & Material Accounts & Assets 

After you switch on, the  Create Supplier Invoice - Advanced app will display an additional tab for Fixed Assets.

 

SAP Help Portal support: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3e5fcf2c768746049b5627bd5a42f720/b805ca4159884132a3799fa6...

Best regards

Edna

entry.title: Re: Delivery time field in sales quotation
entry.content:
Hi @Sanne 

The Customizing 'Define Agreed Delivery Times' is not available in S/4HANA Cloud.

It is currently only available in OnPremise and is missing functionality

 

Please follow 2963059 ( https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2963059 ) and submit a feature request if you would like the customizing added in CBC in a future release

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Please tell me about Reset Transaction Data.
entry.content:
Hi Yusuke_27

-  The information of what will do the job is here Reset Transaction Data

-  In addition, the following blog explains the key considerations, how to execute the process, and what happens with the Transactional Objects Previously Created "Reset Transaction Data" Functionality... And when/how to use it...”

Best Regards

Edna

entry.title: Re: How to calculate % in SAC Dashboard
entry.content:
@TanyaSrivastava 

You have already put up the formula 

Admin exp % = Admin exp/Sales 
Selling exp % = Selling exp/Sales 

Just create calculated account /measures in the story depending on whether Sales, Admin Exp are accounts or measures.

 

Define the formula as below. Once your press [   you will start seeing your original accounts/measures.

 

Finally format this as %

Uncheck Use unit of underlying measures and then set it as %

 

Finally it should show up as % in the story

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: SAP CodeJam in Munich (pre sitMUC 2024)
entry.content:
Hello @thomas_jung 

we are not just asking, but strongly insisting on a CodeJam extravaganza on Friday, October 11th, right before sitMUC 2024. Despite the pain it causes my ABAP heart, I have been coerced by our local community to fall to my knees and plead for a GenAI CodeJam! So here I am, humbly and desperately, beseeching you for this tiny favor...

  • Location: SAP Labs Munich Campus
  • Topic: Generative AI
  • We have the whole day to rock!
  • Contact details: Conrad, hey@conraddonau.de

Cheers from Munich!

Conrad

entry.title: Re: Hyperlink from Field to Group
entry.content:
There are other options as well.
1. You can simply turn on the Hide (Drill-Down OK) option for the Detail section. 
2. You can use an On-Demand Subreport
3. For more advanced scenarios, you can handle the click event using application code.

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam in Munich (pre sitMUC 2024)
entry.content:
We will consider and discuss this request, but please note this is the same week as TechEd.  SAP TechEd Virtual | SAP Events

That could make staffing very difficult.

entry.title: Re: User Management in a Nutshell for the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition
entry.content:
Thank you, George, for putting so much effort into writing the detailed blog. I agree with @Colorado  that this blog would have been incredibly helpful to us if it had been available in 2022 when we began our pilot implementation.

I still have one question regarding the topic of IAS as a proxy. If we use IAS as a proxy, do we need to create the users in IAS for S/4HANA Public Edition?

Regards,

Subbu Iyer

entry.title: Cancel Onboarding in 2.0
entry.content:
Hello,

I had to cancel a candidate in ONB 2.0 this week. I know it is expected for the candidate to not show in the ONB dashboard anymore, but where can I find this candidate in employee central?  How can I find the new hire data details that were completed on the candidate in the system after cancelling?

Thank you

entry.title: Make-to-Order Production Process
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to configure a scenario based on Make-to-Order Production.

How can I achieve this?

Best regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Make-to-Order Production Process
entry.content:
Hi,

For configuring a scenario based on Make-to-Order Production, please take a look at the following links:

# Scope Items

  • Make-to-Order Production - Process Manufacturing (3OK)
  • Make-to-Order Production with Variant Configuration (1YT)

# Community

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Make-to-Order (MTO) with Advanced Variant Configuration Process with Embedded Analytics: Driving Smart Decisions on Custom Manufacturing

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Platform Trial 1909 Available Now
entry.content: the image is not available anymore

entry.title: Re: User Management in a Nutshell for the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition
entry.content:
Hi Subbu,

I don't have an IDP to test IAS's proxy feature, but my gut feeling is that you don't have user info stored in CIS; for that reason, you don't create users in IAS. You need to have user names in S/4HANA side match the user names in your IDP.  IAS will pass the authentication request from S/4HANA to IDP as a proxy/middleman. 

Regards,

George

entry.title: Wrong delivery date - Quote Order to Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello

We are facing some issues when sales orders are created referencing quote orders,

The deliveries are created with the wrong delivery promise date, in sales order it should be 3 days starting from  quote date creation, but it's not take on.

We had a recent migration from ECC to S/4, I checked the legacy system and all the configuration are similar in both environment 

Could you please help with this topic

entry.title: Re: Outbound Communication to S4 On-Premise(OData) from B...
entry.content:
Ah, it was so small, my old eyes couldn't recognize it...

Ok, then I have an idea: the original request runs into a 307. The HTTP client on Cloud side then tries to follow that redirect, and this follow-up request then runs into the 403, before reaching the backend (or even the SCC).

Question is: the URL in the "location" header, is that on a different host, or same host and only the path is different? (Unfortunately some parts are blotted out in your screenshot, so I can't see it.)

If it's a different host, then one possibility would be: in the SCC, you have created a hostname mapping only for the first host, but not for the second. (Or if the scenario works with destinations, a problem could also be, that only a destination for the first host exists in the Cockpit, but not for the second host.) In that case you would see an error message in the SCC's "Audit Log", like "Denying access to system ...."

If only the path is different, one problem could be, that in the "Access Control" settings for the host you have not allowed the second path. Again there would be an error in the Audit Log.

If there is no entry in the Audit Log, this means the 403 for the second request must be coming from a component, before the request reaches the SCC. In that case we would need to check some cloud-side logs in more detail. (I hope, the HTTP client in the Cloud App also traces some low-level details?!)

entry.title: WORZONE FIORI APP ONPREMISE - ERROR 403 - Forbidden
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

I'm trying to connect my WorkZone Standard edition into my Fiori Lauchpad on premise, I've followed this tutorial, and everything works fine:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/access-fiori-apps-via-sap-build-work-zone-site-with-federated-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/13558780


But now my app is visible in the WorkZone site, but when I try to open this app, this 403 error occurs:

This app on my Fiori Lauchpad is working fine, and showing all company codes from API COMPANY_CODE_SRV. I created this APP from BTP BAS, and deployed it directly by cloud connector on my on premise environment.


Thanks for help!

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition 
SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Reading Variable value's attribute in calculated measure
entry.content:
Dear Stephane,

It's not super pretty but if your versions are somewhat fixed a workaround is to hard code the version pairs in a calculated measure using the IF() formula. In the following example there are 4 versions, TD1 to TD4 and it compares: TD1 with TD4, TD2 with TD1, TD3 with TD2 and TD4 with TD3:

The formula for the 'Units Comp' measure is:

IF([d/Version] ="public.TD1" ,LOOKUP([P_SalesUnits],[d/Version]="public.TD4" ,[d/Version] ),IF([d/Version] ="public.TD2",LOOKUP([P_SalesUnits],[d/Version]="public.TD1" ,[d/Version] ),IF([d/Version] ="public.TD3",LOOKUP([P_SalesUnits],[d/Version]="public.TD2" ,[d/Version]),IF([d/Version] ="public.TD4",LOOKUP([P_SalesUnits],[d/Version]="public.TD3" ,[d/Version]),null)))).

A similar set up could work for current year / last year comparisons, as a potential workaround to the limitation of only be able to use the PREVIOUS() function on the default time hierarchy and to bypass the requirement to add this hierarchy in the table / widget.

Kind regards,

Tijs

entry.title: Re: ABAP Platform Trial 1909 Available Now
entry.content:
Dear @greenkernel ,

>the image is not available anymore

Could you please explain a little bit more which image you are missing?

Best Stephan

entry.title: Shared contract
entry.content:
Hi experts!

On a scenario with multiple Provider Contracts sharing an Allowance, trying to run the Recurrence for a Provider Contract "member" we are facing following behaviors:

Running the Activation for the Provider Contract 30, CC is catching data of another "member" (26) linked to the same owner.

This provider contracts have different Subscriber Accounts.

how to solve this situation?

entry.title: Re: calculation in final internal table in amdp class
entry.content: So , basically I am unable to select by fkdat date ranges.

entry.title: Re: Outbound Communication to S4 On-Premise(OData) from B...
entry.content:
@Ulrich_SchmidtThanks a lot for spending some time helping me . Coming to your question i would be great if you can tell me which "location" header you are referring to. There are url configured in "outbound communication" and in "communication Arrangement" ?

Are you referring to this ? when you mean "location" header

entry.title: Customizing of controlling area
entry.content: Where is possible customizing the controlling area in: Central Business configuration.

entry.title: Re: Outbound Communication to S4 On-Premise(OData) from B...
entry.content: You can see the "location" header at the very end of the Response data for the 307 Temporary Redirect. The HTTP client (in the cloud) will trigger a second HTTP request to exactly the URL specified in this field.

entry.title: Re: Outbound Communication to S4 On-Premise(OData) from B...
entry.content:
@Ulrich_SchmidtThe URL in "location" header is virtual/proxy url that is used in the SAP CC configuration

Access Path:

 

In Addition to above:

2nd request goes without a port and 1st request is to port 443. I have highligted in below screenshot.


And in Audit i can see "Deny Access...."

Is that the 2nd request from cloud http client is picking up default port 80????

I am expecting it to pick up 443 since that what coming from Communication System.

Is the UI hostname i gave in above screenshot creating problem? As per my understanding UI hostname is an optional field and it gets defaulted anyway with normal host.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit - A basic guide
entry.content:
I have created this guide to show the basic steps to create and execute a project using the Migration Cockpit.  It was documented using S/4 Hana 2022 On Premise.

Configuration within each system will vary so these steps may need to be modified to address your needs but this basic scenario will help you to get started.

Migration Cockpit

Fiori App F3473 Migrate Your Data

Information on standard user roles required to complete these steps can be found in the Fiori Apps Library for the mentioned app.

 

Example Scenario

In this example I will assign the Class “CONTROLLER” to Material 000000000000000015 with value “NAV_COMM” for Characteristic “AVIONICS”

Material Classification view before migration shows there is no Class assigned currently:

 

Create Project

Create your project using Staging Tables.  This will allow for import of data from excel template files.

Migrating Data Directly from SAP System requires RFC connection set up to the source system and would be used for Extraction of data from that source system.

 

 

Select the objects in scope.  Note there may be more than one version of an object.  In the case of Classifications there is the general template and the object specific templates.  Select objects by checking the box to the left and then use the right arrow in the middle of the screen to add them to your scope. Then click on the Review button

 

Where relevant, you will receive a warning regarding predecessor objects.  It is not always necessary to include each of these in your scope as you may be managing them via alternative methods, including manually, or they may already exist – perhaps your migration project is simply to update existing objects.   Review the list and update your scope as necessary.

Review your settings, edit if necessary and then click Create Project.

 

Edit Project

It is possible to edit some of the settings you made in the Create Project step but there are also some additional settings that can be made.

From the home screen select your project and then click Edit

In General Data you can rename your project and define Custom Scope

In Migration Objects you can change the scope of objects

In CSV File Options you can manage some technical settings for the file import

In Technical Information you can define the retention period for the data in the staging tables.

 

Managing Your Project

Enter your project to begin managing each object

For each object there is a set list of steps or Actions.  Select your object and then the next Action from the dropdown menu.   Each Action is described in the following sections.

 

Download Template

There are two options for downloading the object templates:  xml and csv.  The xml file is actually presented in Excel and includes instructions, a field list (which can also be used as the basis of a field mapping document) and a separate sheet for each sub object.   These correlate to the sections in the field list, which are tables in the structure.

The csv option will provide you with a zip file containing the csv files for each of the sub objects/tables.  These correlate back to each sheet in the xml.

The xml is a little more user friendly.

In this screenshot you can see that the Header sheet in the xml is managed as a separate csv file in the master zip file. 

 

 

Upload Template

When choosing the Upload Template action, in addition to uploading your csv or xml files – or drag and dropping them – you can also review the staging table structure and review documentation about the migration object.  This is very useful information.

Drag and drop or upload your completed template.  The system will validate and notify you of issues.  Once resolved it should confirm successful import of the file.

 

Prepare

If you are using standard template files the system checks the consistency of the data in the staging tables but it will provide the option to perform this check at this point for those who imported data via another tool.

Once you choose to Prepare Staging Tables you can monitor progress via the Monitoring button in menu bar

 

 

Resolve any errors before proceeding to Mapping Tasks.  You may need to delete the uploaded data, correct the issue in the file and then re-upload.

 

Mapping Tasks

You can proceed to the Mapping Tasks step directly from the previous step as shown in previous screenshot or from the home screen for the project.

You now need to map your data :

For each attribute, confirm the source to target mapping.  The system will default the target value to be the same as the source value.  You can overwrite this if you need to.  Each value must be Confirmed, even if you are accepting the defaulted value.

 

 

Simulate

You will now perform a simulation run to validate the data load and expectations.  It can be run for all instances, random or custom selections.  Errors will be presented and must be resolved until your simulation run is clean and “Migrate” is available as the next Action.

 

Migrate

Click on the Action value “Migrate” and then choose which records to process.  Start your migration.

As before, the screen will refresh periodically to show progress but you can also choose the Monitoring button to get up to date progress.  Final status will be presented to the screen.

All data was successfully migrated and we can now check the results.

Material Classification view after migration, shows Class and Characteristic value assigned.

The Action step reverts to “Upload” to allow you to run additional files.  Note, you will need to map any new values that appear in the source data each time.  It is possible to enhance the mapping behavior of each object within a migration project using Gui transaction LTMOM which is the Migration Object Modeler.   This would be considered more of a technical task.

 

Finishing a Project

When all migration activities are completed for a project it is expected that you will mark it as Finished.  This will prevent any further activities being performed or changes being made.  It will also begin the countdown with regard to the data retention period.

If you are creating a project for ongoing upload of data then do not set it to Finished.

entry.title: Agregar Campos en el formulario Cuentas Bancaria propia & SN
entry.content:
Consulta 1

la consulta es, como se puede visualizar en esta pantalla Cuentas Bancarias propia; la visibilidad del campo Currency (Moneda) debido al momento de consultar la tabla DSC1 si existe el campo, nos ayuda se puede  donde que sea visible este campo aparezca en SAP.

 

En la segunda consulta, si se puede agregar un campo llamado Currency (Moneda)  en este formulario en Cuentas bancarias de Socio de Negocios , debido que accedí a UDF no encuentro para adicionar un campo en esa tabla, y verifico que la tabla se llama OCRB.

Como puedo agregar campos a eso dos formulario ?

entry.title: Contact data is not being printed in Purchase Order output.
entry.content:
When displaying Purchase Order Standard output form fields like Telephone, Email Address and Fax Number are missing.

entry.title: Re: Contact data is not being printed in Purchase Order o...
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Please check the following KBA:

3483799 - Contact data is not being printed in Purchase Order output.

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: Compound documents are generating forever in Producer
entry.content:
Hi Mani,

There are many reasons why generating documentation might fail.  The best place to start to troubleshoot the issue is this KBA.  If, after checking the Javascript Console and running the Exe to determine if your laptop is setup correctly, you are still having issues, please raise a ticket using Component ID KM-SEN-PRO and get support involved.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: How we leveraged Generative AI to help our Acccount Executives help you (customers) at Sapphire
entry.content: It's very insightful to see how AI was used in this business context. Thank you for sharing @mangeshpise .

entry.title: Re: Brownfield Data Migration Project Plan Template
entry.content: How many tables? How many rows? Archiving strategy?

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam in Munich (pre sitMUC 2024)
entry.content:
Appreciate the consideration! Rescheduling TechEd would probably be a bit much, right? 😁 But, hear me out:

  • sitMUC is traditionally the week after Oktoberfest, it's practically a rule!
  • And with Oktoberfest ending the week before, some staff might still be in Munich nursing a hangover?
  • This results in one epic SAP week: TechEd, CodeJam and then sitMUC!

Cheers,
Conrad

entry.title: Managing different Label Sizes in SAP. Combine Volumes to meet MOQ
entry.content:
Hello,

We have multiple label setup in SAP. Within all labels, there are only 3 different sizes. We have established a contract with our label supplier that where we would need to meet an MOQ for each size every time we place a PO. Is this possible to achieve in SAP?

entry.title: Hide/mask business partner data Fiori
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

I have a customer who just implementend S4Hana on premise and the users are only allowed to use fiori.
Now we are getting the request to hide/mask the address/e-mail/bank data of the customer/vendor masterdata for certain groups of users.

Is this possible? If yes, how can this be done without customizing? Are solutions for GUI also going to work for fiori?

Many thanks for your feedback.

I have a requirement that consists of calling an RFC in the USER EXIT of MV45AFZZ, I am passing the values but in the RFC the parameters are empty.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

These are the RFC settings.

What could be causing this problem?

entry.title: NEW receiving BIN vs the GR-area bin
entry.content:
When creating the starter system and Dev in sAp s/4hana public cloud the GR-Area Bin is created and all inbound delivery after the GR go there.

Customer wants to name this bin something else. I create a new bin REC-AREA and assigned it to  storage type S910.

I removed the GR-AREA Bin.

Now when I do a goods receipt nothing happens. It will not do the GR.

It cant be this hard. What am I missing? Any help would be greatful

entry.title: $100 off Temu Coupon Code{(acs699118)} for this Month all users
entry.content:
To get $100 off on Temu, sign up or log in to your account. Add items to your cart, ensuring you meet any minimum purchase requirements. Proceed to the checkout page, enter the coupon code "acs699118" in the promo code field, and click "Apply."

Blog Formatting Post-Migration
Due to the migration, some blog formatting changed, resulting in issues like excess white space and broken links. Editing old posts to restore previous formatting often worsens the issue and violates community best practices. We advise focusing on creating new content that adheres to current blogging standards, using the "Clear formatting" option when copying text from Word.

Subscriptions Not Triggering Notifications
Some members, including myself, have experienced issues with subscription notifications. While we investigate, you might try unsubscribing and resubscribing to your tags or adjusting your notification settings. We are working on resolving this problem and will update you as more information becomes available.

Character Restrictions in Display Names
We’re aware of complaints regarding character restrictions in display names and are exploring options to extend them. If your display name was truncated during migration, you can change it in the "My content" area of the site. For more details on display names and profile usernames, please refer to my post about profiles post-migration.

We anticipate more updates as we continue to refine the platform post-migration. Please subscribe to the "What's New" section to stay informed as my colleagues and I share further updates. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

entry.title: Processing 944 IDOCs with multiple error lines
entry.content:
We're in the stretch run of a greenfield S4 implementation, moving from Infor M3. We've run into a snag with inbound 944 IDOCs in that if there's a line with an error, the intake will fail immediately without reviewing the rest of the lines. Our implementer has told us that this is standard SAP behavior and there's no way to change it. 

What we would prefer, and what M3 does, is to continue analyzing the file so we can capture all errors in the first pass. As our S4 environment is currently configured, if an IDOC has multiple errors the only way we would know is to have it fail on the first error, fix and resubmit it, have it fail on the second error, fix and resubmit it, etc. It's hard to imagine there's no way around this behavior given the scale of some of the companies that work with SAP. Can anyone confirm if this is truly a system limitation? If you've found a way around this, can offer us some insight? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Apache spark dataframe jdbc write- how to use table_type= COLUMN during writing dataframe using
entry.content:
Wow! HANA 1 SPS 12 is quite dated and, indeed, it creates a row table https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/4fe29514fd584807ac9f2a04f6754767/20d58a5f75191014b2fe92141b7df228.html?version=1.0.12#syntax-elements

I would assume you need to use JDBC compatible with that version of SAP HANA, which did not have a "TEXT" data type in Java-to-SQL conversion: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/0eec0d68141541d1b07893a39944924e/5be923a2e5bc45afaee4937f9810bb56.html?version=1.0.12&locale=en-US

Due to the migration, some blog formatting changed, resulting in issues like excess white space and broken links. Editing old posts to restore previous formatting often worsens the issue and violates community best practices. We advise focusing on creating new content that adheres to current blogging standards, using the "Clear formatting" option when copying text from Word.

Subscriptions Not Triggering Notifications
Some members, including myself, have experienced issues with subscription notifications. While we investigate, you might try unsubscribing and resubscribing to your tags or adjusting your notification settings. We are working on resolving this problem and will update you as more information becomes available.

Character Restrictions in Display Names
We’re aware of complaints regarding character restrictions in display names and are exploring options to extend them. If your display name was truncated during migration, you can change it in the "My content" area of the site. For more details on display names and profile usernames, please refer to my post about profiles post-migration.

We anticipate more updates as we continue to refine the platform post-migration. Please subscribe to the "What's New" section to stay informed as my colleagues and I share further updates. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.
